Keep counting

아래 단계를 따라 알림 권한을 켜주세요:\n\n1. '설정으로 이동' 버:
Follow these steps to enable notifications:

1. Tap 'Go to Settings' button
2. Find 'Toki' app in Settings
3. Select 'Notifications' menu
4. Turn on 'Allow Notifications'

💡 Recommended settings:
• Show on Lock Screen
• Show in Notification Center
• Show as Banners

This ensures you never miss timer alerts!
알림 권한이 없으면 다음 기능이 제대로 작동하지 않습니다:: Without notification permission, the following features won't work properly:
여러 번 알림받고\n여유있게 마무리:
Get multiple alerts
and finish with ease
타이머 알림을 받으려면 알림 권한이 필요합니다.\n\n권한이 없으면:\n:
Notification permission is required for timer alerts.

Without permission:
• You won't receive pre-alerts
• You won't receive end alerts
• Notifications won't work in background

Please enable notifications in Settings.
타이머 전용 알림 시스템입니다.\n\n• 백그라운드에서도 정확한 시간에:
A dedicated notification system for timers.

• Alerts at exact times even in background
• Automatic permission management for convenience
• Prevents duplicate notifications
• Optimized for time management during mentoring or presentations

Recommended: Keep enhanced notifications enabled
타이머가 실제로 잘 동작하는지 빠르게 확인할 수 있는 모드입니다.\n\n:
A mode to quickly verify that the timer works correctly.

• 10x: 10-minute timer finishes in 1 minute
• 30x: 10-minute timer finishes in 20 seconds
• 60x: 10-minute timer finishes in 10 seconds

You can quickly test all features including alerts, pre-alerts, and overtime.

⚠️ Make sure to turn off test mode for actual use!
타이머를 시작하면 자동으로 템플릿이 저장됩니다: Templates are automatically saved when you start a timer
